name: agent-native-studio-workspace
title: Agent-Native Studio Workspace
description: One cohesive Studio workspace pack for the 13 public Agent-Native template apps: Dispatch mission control plus Clips, Plan, Design, Content, Slides, Analytics, Mail, Forms, Brain, Assets, Calendar, and Chat.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Aggregate workspace pack for the public Agent-Native template family; installs every public template workspace as one cohesive graph while keeping Harness governance and the real Agent-Native gateway as runtime owners.

upstream.integratedAs: cohesive workspace pack depending on every public Agent-Native template workspace package

compatibility.shadcn: Install graph coordinates Studio UI registry metadata for all public Agent-Native template workspace packs.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
